name: robomp
description: Self-hosted GitHub triage-and-fix bot driving oh-my-pi.

scripts.dev: bun run build && bun run up && bun run logs
scripts.build: bun run pi-artifacts && docker compose build
scripts.rebuild: bash scripts/with-pi-root.sh bash -c 'docker build --no-cache -t "${PI_ARTIFACTS_IMAGE:-oh-my-pi/artifacts:dev}" "$PI_ROOT"' && docker compose build --no-cache
scripts.image-info: docker image inspect robomp:dev --format 'size: {{.Size}} bytes  layers: {{len .RootFS.Layers}}  created: {{.Created}}'
scripts.log-grep: docker compose logs --no-color robomp | grep -i -- "$1" || true
scripts.triage: docker compose exec robomp robomp triage "$1"
scripts.replay: docker compose exec robomp robomp replay "$1"
scripts.issue-status: docker compose exec robomp robomp status
scripts.cleanup: docker compose exec robomp robomp cleanup "$1"
scripts.lint: bun run lint:ts && bun run lint:py
scripts.lint:py: ruff check src tests && ruff format --check src tests
scripts.fix: bun run fix:ts && bun run fix:py
scripts.fix:py: ruff check --fix src tests && ruff format src tests
scripts.tool-calls: docker compose exec robomp sqlite3 -header -column /data/robomp.sqlite "SELECT id, ts, tool, COALESCE(error,'ok') AS err FROM tool_calls WHERE issue_key='$1' ORDER BY id;"
scripts.recent-events: docker compose exec robomp sqlite3 -header -column /data/robomp.sqlite "SELECT received_at, event_type, issue_key, state, attempts FROM events ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT ${1:-20};"
scripts.stuck: docker compose exec robomp sqlite3 -header -column /data/robomp.sqlite "SELECT delivery_id, event_type, issue_key, state, attempts, started_at FROM events WHERE state IN ('queued','running') ORDER BY received_at;"
scripts.reset: docker compose down -v && (docker image rm ${PI_ARTIFACTS_IMAGE:-oh-my-pi/artifacts:dev} || true)
